title: Trico Tri Happy Halloween
overview: A family moves back to Miami to take care of its widowed abuela. After moving into a haunted house, the family learns the intentions of the ghosts that inhabit it.

trailers.title: Trico Tri: Happy Halloween (Official Trailer 2018) Starts September 28th. Are you afraid of ghosts?
